data.body: 46f0 IMPLEMENTED (held-out subagent): all_review_results readers (plan+code), rebar/audit/read.py aggregator (AuditTrail w/ CompletionRecord), CLI 'rebar audit show' via help/audit.txt + _audit_commands.py intercept, MCP audit_trail read tool. Held-out oracle GREEN (5 tests incl bare-ticket + enumerator edge). Subagent updated CLI/MCP drift-gate inventories (overview, goldens, gen_cli_reference, mcp-reference, schema-coverage). fde0 (693) fully green -> closing. 46f0 full CI running. Board: 4e19/7c84/e7e0 closed; fde0 closing; 46f0 impl done.
